notes.structure_model: Use Gemini Lite preview to fuse transcript/OCR raw materials into a source-aligned outline before draft generation.
notes.audit_model: Use Gemini Lite preview to audit the rewritten note against the structured outline and report omissions or style drift.
notes.draft_model: Reserved; default pipeline no longer depends on Qwen draft generation.
notes.rewrite_model: GPT-5.4 final rewrite / repair for stronger instruction-following and detail retention.
notes.controller_model: Dialogue, orchestration, start-stop control, and exception routing only.
